message:
Fix login landing on Dashboard instead of first sidebar item (#203)

On login, the app always landed on the main Dashboard ("/") instead of
the first item in the user's sidebar. Two issues:

1. The "/" path was saved as lastRoute, so on next login the restore
   logic found lastRoute="/" and skipped the first-sidebar redirect.
   Fix: don't persist "/" as the last route.

2. The restore logic only called getFirstDashboardRoute() in the else
   branch. Simplified to always compute firstSidebarRoute upfront.

Now the app redirects to the first sidebar item (e.g., /clusters) when
no meaningful saved route exists.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
